channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Arsenal face PSG in Champions League final as defensive strength takes centre stage
item.description: Arsenal are set for a high-stakes Champions League final clash against Paris Saint-Germain in Budapest, with both teams chasing European glory under managers Mikel Arteta and Luis Enrique. The London ...

item.title: UKZN student footballers signed to Durban City FC DDC squad for 2026/27 season
item.description: Three University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) student footballers have been officially recruited into the Durban City Football Club (FC) DStv Diski Challenge (DDC) squad for the 2026/27 season. The announc...

item.title: Trump's Latest Medical Exam Confirms He Remains in Good Health
item.description: The White House announced that U.S. President Donald Trump is in excellent health following his most recent medical examination at Walter Reed National Military Medical Center on May 27, 2026. This wa...

item.title: Suspect injured after jumping from balcony while attempting to evade arrest in Batangas rape case
item.description: A man accused of rape was injured after reportedly jumping from a balcony in an attempt to escape arrest in Talisay, Batangas. According to reports, personnel from the Philippine National Police (PNP)...

item.title: Arsenal Supporters Undertake Complex Journeys to Attend Champions League Final in Budapest
item.description: Following Arsenal's recent Premier League triumph, fans are eagerly making their way to Budapest for the Champions League final against Paris Saint-Germain. With direct flights fully booked and prices...

item.title: NTSA Updates Traffic Fines System Allowing Motorists to Contest Minor Offences in Court
item.description: The National Transport and Safety Authority (NTSA) has rolled out an updated traffic fines system starting Monday, June 1, giving motorists more flexibility in handling minor traffic offences. Unlike ...

item.title: India and Russia review expansion of maritime, defence and strategic cooperation in Moscow talks
item.description: India’s National Security Advisor Ajit Doval held a series of high-level meetings in Moscow with senior Russian officials, including Nikolai Patrushev, Aide to the President and Chairman of Russia’s M...

item.title: Mothers Share Their Experiences Raising Children with Cleft Lip and Palate in South Africa
item.description: In South Africa, mothers are speaking out about the challenges and triumphs of raising children born with cleft lip and palate, a condition affecting the lip and roof of the mouth. Yvette Claassens fr...

item.title: Tortellino d’Oro Expands to Sandton with Second Branch
item.description: Tortellino d’Oro, a cherished Italian restaurant in Joburg, is opening its second branch in Sandton Gate under the guidance of Caterina Bollini and her son Lorenzo. The original restaurant, tucked awa...

item.title: Eritrean delegation attends ACP–EU parliamentary meetings in Eswatini to discuss Samoa Agreement implementation
item.description: An Eritrean delegation took part in high-level meetings of the Organization of African, Caribbean and Pacific States (OACPS) Parliamentary Group and the Africa–European Union Parliamentary Assembly, h...

item.title: FBI Traces Minnesota Fraud Proceeds to Nairobi Luxury Apartment in Kileleshwa
item.description: The FBI is investigating a suspected fraudster linked to the Minnesota scam alleged to be worth KSh 11.6 trillion. The case involves several suspects, including Muhammad Omar, a 32-year-old from Rosev...

item.title: BC Lions defeat Winnipeg Blue Bombers 30–19 in CFL pre-season finale
item.description: The Winnipeg Blue Bombers concluded their pre-season schedule with a 30–19 loss to the BC Lions at Princess Auto Stadium on Friday night. The result was largely considered secondary, as the Bombers re...

item.title: White House physician reports Donald Trump in good health after latest medical examination
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has been declared to be in ‘excellent health’ and fully fit to serve as commander-in-chief following a comprehensive medical examination conducted at Walter Reed National M...

item.title: Military operations free 31 abducted persons and neutralise five terrorists in Zamfara and Katsina
item.description: Troops under Sector 2 Operation Fansan Yamma have successfully carried out coordinated military operations across Zamfara and Katsina states, leading to the rescue of 31 kidnapped victims and the neut...

item.title: Queenie Pacquiao completes high school, marking a milestone for the Pacquiao family
item.description: Queenie Pacquiao, the daughter of former world boxing champion and Philippine senator Manny Pacquiao and his wife Jinkee Pacquiao, has officially graduated from high school. The milestone was shared t...

item.title: US Defence Secretary urges Asian allies to increase military spending amid concerns over China’s growing power
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has warned Asian allies about China’s rapidly expanding military capabilities and urged them to significantly increase their defence spending. Speaking at the Shangri...

item.title: Lawmaker raises concerns over timing of Senate flood control probe during VP Duterte impeachment process
item.description: A Philippine lawmaker has raised concerns regarding the timing of the Senate’s investigation into flood control projects, suggesting that it comes at a politically sensitive moment as impeachment proc...

item.title: Chatsworth couple sentenced to life imprisonment for prolonged abuse and torture of 10-year-old girl
item.description: A Chatsworth couple, both aged 31, have been sentenced to life imprisonment in the Durban Regional Court for the prolonged abuse, torture, and neglect of a 10-year-old girl who had been placed in the ...

item.title: Bill Nighy on his podcast 'ill-advised' and life reflections at 76
item.description: Bill Nighy, the beloved British actor known for films such as 'Love Actually' and 'About Time', has recently found a new creative outlet in podcasting. At 76, he hosts 'ill-advised', a gentle and humo...

item.title: US urges Asian allies to increase defence spending amid concerns over China’s military expansion at Singapore summit
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has called on Asian allies to significantly increase their defence spending, warning that China’s rapid military build-up is raising legitimate concerns about regiona...
